pageContext.name: The Mandalorian Beskar Armor (Silver Coating Version)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Bandai are proud to present The Mandalorian Beskar Armor (Silver Coating Version) Model Kit!  This stunningly detailed 1:12 scale model joins the Bandai Spirits line standing at six inches tall and includes a selection of weapons including his trusty Beskar Spear and the fabled Dark Saber.  Be sure to add this Model Kit to your Star Wars collection!
